overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a dystopian cyberpunk city during a toxic acid rainstorm with heavy green-yellow haze. The player walks through a debris-filled shanty encampment under an overpass, transitions through narrow alleys with neon lighting, and emerges onto a rain-slicked commercial street lined with digital billboards and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift shanty encampment under concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through debris-filled shanty area with abandoned furniture and trash piles

entered.detail: horizontal metal slat fencing running along the right side
discarded sofa furniture sitting among debris
damaged dark vehicle partially buried in trash
piles of blue and black garbage bags scattered on ground
makeshift canvas tent with wooden supports
massive concrete overhead highway structure with support beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sheltered shanty camp under a concrete overpass during a toxic rainstorm. The ground is covered in gravel and debris including abandoned furniture, trash bags, and makeshift tents. Metal barriers line the right side while the camera moves forward through the encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with stone railing overlooking trees

events.description: exits covered shanty area onto open elevated walkway with visible sky and trees

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete path with stone railing on the left side

entered.detail: low stone balustrade running along the left edge of the walkway
large imposing building with raw concrete facade and small windows
tall leafy trees visible beyond the railing in the green haze
vertical metal bar fencing continuing along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the enclosed shanty to an open elevated walkway with a stone railing. A brutalist concrete building rises on the right while mature trees are visible through the green toxic haze on the left. The ground changes from gravel to concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with corrugated metal walls and neon lighting

neon pink light strips on the right wall illuminate the alley with colored glow

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage toward the distant street lights

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead toward the street exit

entered.detail: industrial corrugated metal sheeting forming the alley wall
smooth concrete surface of adjacent building
horizontal pink neon tube light mounted on the metal wall
makeshift shelter covered with blue tarpaulin sheeting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alleyway between industrial buildings with corrugated metal walls. Pink neon light strips illuminate the right wall as the player walks toward the distant street. A figure is visible walking ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital advertisements and storefronts

events.description: emerges from narrow alley onto wide commercial street with neon billboards
futuristic vehicle drives past on the wet street reflecting neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and digital displays

futuristic black car driving along the wet street

tall pole with bright linear LED light fixture
building facade with glowing signage and entrance
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
red metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a wide commercial street drenched in rain and neon light. Digital billboards glow on the right while pedestrians walk along the wet pavement. A futuristic car drives past on the street as the camera continues forward past storefronts and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area under massive overpass with video screen installations

events.description: approaches and passes under large concrete overpass structure
passes small building completely covered in video advertisement screens

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward an open plaza with video screen installations

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the video screen building

entered.detail: massive highway overpass with thick support pillars spanning the plaza
small structure covered entirely in digital video screens showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a massive concrete overpass structure spanning a plaza. Passing underneath, the scene reveals a small building completely covered in glowing video screens. Palm trees stand in planters nearby while a person sits on a bench. The toxic green haze continues to permeate the neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, debris-strewn shanty camp into a narrow, neon-lit industrial alleyway. It begins under a concrete overpass, moving through a landscape of gravel, makeshift tents, and abandoned furniture while toxic rain falls around the encampment. As the camera leaves the shelter, the scene opens onto an elevated concrete walkway where the gravel gives way to a sidewalk, flanked by a brutalist building and trees obscured by a thick green haze. The path then shifts into a confined alleyway between corrugated metal walls, where the oppressive gray tones are replaced by the glow of pink neon light strips. The movement concludes as the camera follows a distant figure walking toward the street ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched commercial thoroughfare into a sheltered plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. It begins by emerging from a narrow alley onto a wide street where digital billboards glow against the wet pavement and a futuristic car drives past. As the camera pushes forward past storefronts and palm trees, the open street gradually gives way to the looming shadow of a heavy concrete structure. The scene then shifts underneath the overpass, revealing a small building entirely enveloped in glowing video screens and a lone figure resting on a nearby bench. Finally, the perspective settles within the plaza, where the pervasive toxic green haze blends with the vibrant neon lighting of the urban environment.
